title: @rethunk/mcp-multi-root-git: git_worktree_add
description: Parameter schema for the 'git_worktree_add' MCP tool.

rootIndex.description: 0-based index into the MCP file roots list; ignored when workspaceRoot is set.

allWorkspaceRoots.description: Fan out across all MCP file roots.

path.description: Filesystem path for the new worktree. Relative paths are resolved from the git toplevel.

branch.description: Branch to check out in the new worktree. Created from `baseRef` if absent.

baseRef.description: Commit-ish to base the new branch on when it does not yet exist. Default: HEAD.
